package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for sql_null_types_escape_repository_boundary: Repository methods that leak driver-specific null wrappers beyond the persistence boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule190NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule190NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule190NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario190Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule190NegativeService, input Rule190NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
